summary.goal: Declare MSRV (rust-version = "1.74") in Cargo.toml; confirm --version is already wired via clap
decisions: rust-version = "1.74" chosen because clap 4 requires 1.74 as its minimum — the effective floor for this dependency set
the bare version attribute on #[command] in main.rs was already wiring --version from CARGO_PKG_VERSION; no source change required
